title: Invisible elytra
description: This texture pack makes elytra completely invisible, providing an unobstructed view of your skin and armor.
body:
This texture pack makes elytra completely invisible, providing an unobstructed view of your skin and armor. Works only without a cape.

![How it looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f677992612875d6a07b9648e915e717efcb655.png)
